parts.text: I'm a 30-year-old male, 175cm, 70kg, moderately active. I want a healthy weekly meal plan with a daily calorie target of 2000 calories. I like chicken and vegetables, and I'm allergic to peanuts. My budget is $100 per week.
I need a high protein meal plan. I'm 25, female, 165cm, 60kg, active lifestyle. Target 1800 calories with 120g protein daily. I have no allergies, budget $80.
I want a budget-friendly meal plan. 35-year-old male, 180cm, 80kg, sedentary. Target 2200 calories. I only have $50 for the week. I dislike fish.
Help me lose weight with a meal plan. I'm 40, female, 160cm, 75kg, light activity. Target 1500 calories. I'm vegetarian. Budget $60 weekly.
I have chicken breast 500g, eggs 6, milk 1L, and rice 200g at home. What meals can I make? I want a daily plan for tomorrow. I'm 28, male, 170cm, 65kg, active. No allergies.
